speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: unka sar neechu na ho
text: Unka sar neechu na ho, isliye main chupchap unki baat maan kar apne saare sapne daba rahi hoon. Doctor ne phir stress bol kar nikaal diya, par unhe kya pata ki divorcee hone ke baad 'log kya kahenge' wale darr ne meri career ambition ko qaid kar liya hai. Main dobara job shuru karna chahti hoon par Mummy kehti hain ki ghar ki izzat bachane ke liye ab mujhe bas bacchon ki dekhbhaal karni chahiye aur samaj mein shant rehna chahiye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens C to mirror the relational pressure and the need to preserve family honor over personal career goals.
text: Aapki baaton se lag raha hai ki Mummy ki khushi aur parivaar ki izzat ke liye aapne apne saare ambitions ko side mein rakh diya hai taaki unka sar neechu na ho.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: unka sar neechu na ho
text: Haan, bas yahi koshish rehti hai ki unka sar neechu na ho. Par andar hi andar ek ghutan si hoti hai. Pehle hi divorce ki wajah se samaj mein itni baatein hui, ab agar main job ke liye bahar jaungi toh log pata nahi kya-kya bolenge. Mummy ko bas isi baat ka darr rehta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens E to mirror the feared consequence of societal judgment that dictates her current behavior.
text: Samaj ki baaton ka darr aur Mummy ki fikr aapko is qadar rok rahi hai ki aapko lagta hai bahar nikalte hi log phir se ungli uthayenge.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: unka sar neechu na ho
text: Sahi kaha aapne. Main unka sar neechu na ho isliye bacchon mein busy rehti hoon, par meri apni pehchaan toh khatam hi ho gayi hai. Kya ek divorcee maa ka career nahi ho sakta? Mummy ko lagta hai ki ghar par rehna hi 'safe' hai hamari izzat ke liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens D to mirror the duration of this internal suppression and the long-term impact on her identity.
text: Itne samay se aap is 'safe' raaste par chal rahi hain, par is dauran aapki apni pehchaan kahin piche chhoot gayi hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: unka sar neechu na ho
text: Bilkul piche chhoot gayi hai. Kabhi kabhi lagta hai main selfish ho rahi hoon career ke baare mein soch kar. Mummy ne itna support kiya divorce ke time, ab unka sar neechu na ho meri kisi zid ki wajah se. Isliye main bas haan mein haan mila deti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Asking a question to explore the internal conflict between her gratitude and her suppressed desires.
text: Mummy ke support aur unki expectations ke beech, aap apne dabe hue sapno ko kaise handle karti hain?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: unka sar neechu na ho
text: Handle kahan kar paati hoon. Bas raat ko roti hoon jab bacche so jaate hain. Din bhar toh wahi dikhava chalta hai ki main khush hoon. Par unka sar neechu na ho, ye fikar mujhe chain se sone nahi deti. Lagta hai main kisi pinjre mein band hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens C again to emphasize the relational trade-off she is making.
text: Ghar ki shanti aur Mummy ke samman ke liye aap har roz is pinjre mein rehne ka samjhauta kar rahi hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, samjhauta hi toh hai. Par ab thak gayi hoon. Kabhi lagta hai kisi se baat karoon, par phir wahi darr ki koi 'pagal' na samjhe ya baatein na banaye. Divorcee hoon toh log waise hi judge karte hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Responding to stigma cue with a shorter restatement and soft pause using Lens E.
text: Logon ke judge karne aur 'pagal' samajhne ka darr aapko baat karne se bhi rok deta hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: unka sar neechu na ho
text: Sahi baat hai. Mummy ko lagta hai divorce ke baad itni mushkil se toh sab shant hua hai, ab phir kyun hungama karna? Par unhe kaise samjhaun ki career mere liye sirf paisa nahi, meri self-respect hai. Unka sar neechu na ho, isliye main chup rehti hoon, par andar se toot rahi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the feeling of being TRAPPED/HELPLESS due to the C2/C3 context and Relational Preservation coping.
text: Lagta hai aap is 'shanti' ke bojh ke niche khud ko HELPLESS aur TRAPPED mehsoos kar rahi hain, jahan aapke apne jazbaaton ki koi jagah nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Wahi toh! Bilkul trapped mehsoos karti hoon. Aapne sahi pakda. Aisa lagta hai jaise meri life meri hai hi nahi, bas ek role play kar rahi hoon 'achi beti' aur 'achi maa' ka.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating her feelings as culturally normal for a woman in her position in India.
text: Aapka aisa mehsoos karna bahut swabhavik hai. Hamare samaj mein aksar divorcee mahilaon se umeed ki jati hai ki wo ab sirf sacrifice karein aur apni pehchaan bhul jayein, par aapka sapne dekhna bilkul galat nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: unka sar neechu na ho
text: Kaash Mummy bhi ye baat samajh paati. Par main unka sar neechu na ho isliye unse behes nahi karti. Wo bas purani soch mein hain. Par main kab tak aise hi bethi rahungi? Bacche bade ho jayenge, phir mera kya?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Brief systemic anecdote about how this pattern is common in Indian households.
text: Working women aur khaskar divorcee status mein ye tension bahut common hai — sirf tumhara struggle nahi hai, lekin koi khul ke bolega nahi kyunki biradari mein image kharab hone ka darr sabko rehta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Wahi image ka darr... ab kya karoon? Kuch samajh nahi aa raha aage ka. Koi raasta hai kya jisse main Mummy ko dukh bhi na doon aur apna kaam bhi shuru kar sakoon? Batao kya karoon?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Providing low-obligation, culturally feasible suggestions that fit her constraints.
text: Aap ye do cheezein try kar sakti hain: Pehla, ghar se hi koi chota freelancing ya online kaam dekhein jise aap bacchon ke saath handle kar sakein bina ghar ke bahar jaye. Doosra, Mummy se career ke bajaye 'bacchon ke future' ke liye financial independence ki baat karke dekhein. Aapko kya lagta hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Online kaam ka idea accha hai! Isse Mummy ko bhi darr nahi lagega ki main bahar ja rahi hoon. Aur unhe financial help milegi toh shayad wo khush bhi ho jayein. Ye pehla step kaise shuru karoon?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walking through the first step of the suggestion.
text: Pehle yeh karo ki aaj raat bas 15 minute nikaal kar apni purani CV check karo ya koi aisi skill dekho jo online kaam aa sake... phir kal koi ek freelancing site browse karo... bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek hai, main aaj hi CV dhundhti hoon. Thoda dar lag raha hai par lag raha hai ki main kuch kar sakti hoon. Mummy ko bina naraz kiye ye ek rasta lag raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Systemic reframe to normalize the struggle of returning to work after a gap/divorce.
text: Career restart karna divorce ke baad structural challenge hota hai, sirf aapki mehnat ki baat nahi hai. Isliye dheere-dheere kadam badhana hi behtar hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi hai, main jaldi baazi nahi karungi. Bas ye feeling acchi hai ki main sirf Mummy ki umeedon ke liye apni life waste nahi kar rahi, balki unka samman rakhte hue bhi rasta nikaal rahi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens C to validate the balance she is trying to strike between self and family.
text: Aap Mummy ki izzat aur apni khwahishon ke beech ek bohot hi balance wala rasta dhundh rahi hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, bas yahi balance chahiye tha. Ab thoda bojh kam lag raha hai. I think if I show Mummy the extra income, wo dhire-dhire maan jayengi ki job bura nahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens E to mirror the positive outcome she is hoping for with Mummy.
text: Aapko umeed hai ki jab Mummy fayda dekhengi, toh unka career ko lekar darr bhi kam ho jayega.

speaker: Seeker
text: Umeed toh hai. Aur agar nahi bhi mana toh kam se kam mujhe pata hai ki main koshish kar rahi hoon. Aaj ki baaton se dil halka ho gaya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating her effort and progress in the current cultural context.
text: Ye jaan kar khushi hui. Apne darr aur samaj ki bandishon ke beech apne liye itna sochna bhi ek badi kamyabi hai, chahe outcome kuch bhi ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Shukriya. Aapne meri baat itne dhyan se suni aur mujhe samjha, mere liye yahi bohot bada support hai. Ab main bina kisi darr ke so sakti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens D to acknowledge the transition to a calmer state after the conversation.
text: Itni lambi bechaini ke baad, ab aap thodi sukoon ki neend lene ke liye taiyaar mehsoos kar rahi hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ji bilkul. Kal subah uth kar nayi shuruaat karungi. Bas yahi koshish rahegi ki unka sar neechu na ho aur meri khushi bhi bani rahe.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens C to finalize the focus on her combined goals of family honor and self.
text: Aap parivaar ka samman banaye rakhte hue apni khushi ki nayi raah banane ka hosla rakh rahi hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ji, ab mujhme thoda hosla hai. Shukriya aapka. Main ab ye strategy zaroor follow karungi. Apna dhyan rakhiyega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Closing affirmation for her resilience.
text: Aapki himmat dekh kar bahut accha laga. Yaad rakhiyega ki aap akeli nahi hain. Aapne jo aaj clarity dikhayi hai wohi aapko aage le jayegi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Zaroor. Aapki baatein yaad rahengi. Bye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens D to acknowledge the end of this session with a sense of closure.
text: Is baatcheet ne aaj aapko jo sukoon diya hai, woh aapke saath rahe. Khayal rakhein.

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek hai. Bye bye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Final short sign-off mirroring her farewell.
text: Namaste. Phir kabhi zaroorat ho toh yahan zaroor aana.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: sabka maan rakhne ke liye main apni awaaz daba leti hoon
text: Doctor ko lagta hai ye mamuli stress hai, par unhe nahi dikhta ki ek 'achi bahu' ki image bachane ke liye main apni economic independence ki bali chadha rahi hoon. Sasural wale chahte hain ki main career bhool kar bas ghar sambhalun taaki rishta bana rahe, aur main mana nahi kar sakti kyunki dobara divorce ka stigma parivaar nahi jhel payega. Sabka maan rakhne ke liye main apni awaaz daba leti hoon, chahe andar se main poori tarah toot chuki hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens C to reflect the relational sacrifice while respecting the stigma cue with a soft pause.
text: Parivaar ki izzat aur rishta bachane ki koshish mein tumne apni zarooraton ko bilkul peeche rakh diya hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: sabka maan rakhne ke liye main apni awaaz daba leti hoon
text: Haan, bas yahi darr hai. Agar maine apne career ki baat ki toh ghar mein kalesh shuru ho jayega. Phir wahi taane milenge ki 'pehle bhi ek baar ghar toot chuka hai'. Isliye sabka maan rakhne ke liye main apni awaaz daba leti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens E to mirror the feared consequence of the divorce stigma.
text: Tumhe lagta hai ki agar tumne apne liye stand liya, toh log dobara divorce ka thappa tumhare aur tumhare parivaar par laga denge.

speaker: Seeker
text: Wahi toh sabse bada darr hai. Mummy-Papa ne itni mushkil se ye rishta karwaya tha. Unhe lagta hai 'achi bahu' wahi hai jo sab adjust kar le. Par meri identity ka kya? Kya meri economic independence ki koi keemat nahi hai?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Deepening exploration about the duration of this internal conflict using Lens D logic in a question.
text: Kitne waqt se tum is 'achi bahu' ke label aur apni azaadi ke beech mein pis rahi ho?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: sabka maan rakhne ke liye main apni awaaz daba leti hoon
text: Shaadi ke do mahine baad se hi ye sab shuru ho gaya tha. Ab ek saal hone ko hai. Roz wahi ghutan hoti hai. Par main chup rehti hoon, sabka maan rakhne ke liye main apni awaaz daba leti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Naming the feeling of TRAPPED/HELPLESS specific to C2/C3 + Relational Preservation.
text: Lagta hai tum is rishte mein bilkul trapped mehsoos kar rahi ho, jahan compromise karna tumhari choice nahi balki ek majboori ban gayi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha aapne. Majboori hi hai. Mere husband bhi kehte hain ki 'thoda adjust kar lo, maa-baap khush rahenge'. Koi nahi samajhta ki financial freedom mere liye kitni zaroori hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating as culturally normal but separating worth from the role.
text: Ghar ki shanti banaye rakhne ke liye khud ko mita dena humare samaj mein normal mana jata hai, par tumhari financial independence ki chahat koi galat baat nahi hai—yeh tumhari apni pehchaan hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: sabka maan rakhne ke liye main apni awaaz daba leti hoon
text: Mujhe guilt hota hai jab main unke khilaf sochti hoon. Mummy-Papa ne itni umeedon se shadi karwayi thi. Bas isliye sabka maan rakhne ke liye main apni awaaz daba leti hoon, taaki unhe meri wajah se phir se sharaminda na hona pade.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Systemic anecdote about the pressure on remarried women in India.
text: Aise halat mein 'achi bahu' banne ka pressure aksar un aurton par zyada hota hai jo divorce ke baad dubara ghar basati hain—logon ko lagta hai ab toh har baat maan hi leni chahiye, sirf tum hi is pressure ko nahi jhel rahi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul wahi baat hai. Sabko lagta hai ki mujhe 'ehsaanmand' hona chahiye. Par main thak chuki hoon. Kabhi lagta hai ab bas bahut hua, par raasta nahi dikhta. Batao main kya karoon?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Systemic reframe to normalize the struggle as structural.
text: Humare samaj mein aurton ki economic independence ko aksar parivaarik maryada ke khilaf dekha jata hai, jo ki ek purana khayal hai, tumhara dukh is galat system ki wajah se hai, tumhari wajah se nahi.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: sabka maan rakhne ke liye main apni awaaz daba leti hoon
text: Samaj toh nahi badlega, par mujhe kuch karna hoga. Main aise kab tak sabka maan rakhne ke liye apni awaaz daba leti rahungi? Koi raasta hai kya?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Providing low-stakes, culturally fitting suggestions.
text: Hum do choti cheezein try kar sakte hain: Pehla, kya tum apne husband se kisi shaant waqt mein career ki nahi, balki apni 'khushi' ki baat kar sakti ho? Doosra, kya tum koi chota work-from-home ya online course shuru kar sakti ho jo ghar ke kaamo ke beech fit ho jaye?

speaker: Seeker
text: Work-from-home shayad wo maan jayein agar unhe lage ki main ghar sambhal rahi hoon. Par baat kaise shuru karun? Mujhe darr lagta hai ki wo gussa na ho jayein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walking through the suggestion step-by-step.
text: Pehle koi aisa chota freelance kaam dhoondho jo tumhari pasand ka ho... phir kisi din jab mahool acha ho, unhe dikhao ki isse tum ghar baithe apna mann behla sakti ho... bas itna hi aaj ke liye socho.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: sabka maan rakhne ke liye main apni awaaz daba leti hoon
text: Theek hai, main aaj online kuch options check karungi. Kam se kam ek shuruat toh hogi. Warna sabka maan rakhne ke liye main apni awaaz daba leti hoon aur andar hi andar khatam ho rahi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens B to mirror the shift towards reclaiming agency within her role.
text: Ek 'achi bahu' ke farz nibhaate hue bhi, tum ab apne liye ek choti si azaadi ki raah nikalne ki koshish kar rahi ho.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ye ghutan career vs sanskar ki ladaai ki wajah se hai
text: Doctor ne phir symptoms dismiss kar diye, par ye ghutan career vs sanskar ki ladaai ki wajah se hai jo main roz khud se ladti hoon. Main office ki promotion thukra rahi hoon kyunki log kahenge ki divorced aurat haath se nikal gayi hai aur bacchon par dhyan nahi de rahi. Maa-baap ki parvarish par sawal na uthein, isliye main apni suppressed identity ko smile ke peeche chhupa kar sabki seva karti rehti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens C to mirror the relational pressure and the need to protect family reputation.
text: Aap apne parents ki image aur bacchon ki khatir itna bada sacrifice de rahi hain, taaki samaj unki parvarish par koi ungli na uthaye.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ye ghutan career vs sanskar ki ladaai ki wajah se hai
text: Sahi kaha, par ye ghutan career vs sanskar ki ladaai ki wajah se roz badhti ja rahi hai. Promotion mere liye thi, meri mehnat thi, par mere divorce ke baad se log waise hi meri har baat ko judge karte hain. Ab agar main late night meetings karungi, toh sab kahenge ki iska dimag toh career mein hai, ghar-parivaar toh pehle hi bigaad chuki hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens B to mirror the conflict between professional achievement and perceived societal duty.
text: Office mein apni mehnat ka phal milne ke bawajood, aapko lagta hai ki aapka asli farz sirf bacchon aur ghar tak hi limited rehna chahiye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Society mein rehna hai toh limits toh follow karni hi padegi na? Main koi swarthi ma toh nahi ban sakti. Par andar hi andar ye bojh itna hai ki sar dard aur body pain khatam hi nahi hota. Shayad main hi kamzor hoon jo ye sab handle nahi kar paa rahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Responding to stigma_cue with a short restatement using Lens E (feared consequence).
text: Aapko darr lagta hai ki agar aapne apne sapne chunne, toh log aapko ek swarthi maa ka label de denge...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ye ghutan career vs sanskar ki ladaai ki wajah se hai
text: Label toh log laga hi denge. Mere parents ne itna kuch saha hai mere divorce ke waqt, ab main unhe phir se 'beti haath se nikal gayi' wala taana nahi sunne de sakti. Par ye ghutan career vs sanskar ki ladaai mein mujhe bilkul khatam kar rahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens D to mirror the duration and constant nature of this internal battle.
text: Kaafi samay se aap har din isi kashmakash mein bita rahi hain, jahan aapki mehnat aur parivaar ki shanti aapas mein takra rahi hain.

speaker: Seeker

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Asking a question rooted in her words about the two 'lives' she is leading.
text: Ghar ki 'ideal' image aur office ki kaabiliyat ke beech balance banate-banate, kya aapko kabhi apne liye koi jagah dikhti hai?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ye ghutan career vs sanskar ki ladaai ki wajah se hai
text: Sachi baat bolun toh bilkul nahi. Ye ghutan career vs sanskar ki ladaai mein meri apni identity kahin kho gayi hai. Main bas ek machine ban gayi hoon jo sabko khush rakhne ki koshish karti hai. Mujhe gussa bhi aata hai, par gussa dikhaun toh 'bad-tameez' kehlayi jaungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting ISOLATION as per S4 Phase 2 for C6 + Relational_Pres.
text: Lagta hai ki is 'ideal' banne ke chakkar mein aap bahut zyada ISOLATION mehsoos kar rahi hain, jahan aapka gussa aur apki zaruratein koi dekh hi nahi raha.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aapne bilkul sahi pakda. Sab itne khush hain ki main promotion chhod rahi hoon aur ghar sambhaal rahi hoon, par kisi ne mujhse ye nahi poocha ki main kaisa feel kar rahi hoon. Mujhe khud se nafrat hone lagti hai jab main jhoot bolti hoon ki main theek hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating her feelings as culturally normal for a single mother in a metro setting.
text: Ek single mother ke liye career aur parivaar ke beech itna pressure feel karna bohot normal hai. Yeh samajh lijiye ki aapki value sirf is baat se nahi hai ki aap kitna sacrifice karti hain, aapki apni mehnat ki bhi utni hi keemat hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ye ghutan career vs sanskar ki ladaai ki wajah se hai

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Systemic anecdote about the pressure on divorced women in Indian society.
text: Humaari society mein divorced auraton par hamesha do-guna nazar rakhi jaati hai—sirf tumhare saath nahi, har us aurat ke saath hota hai jo apni marzi se jeena chahti hai, kyunki log 'log kya kahenge' ke darr ko hamesha badhawa dete hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Wahi darr toh meri ragon mein daudta hai. Par main kab tak aise jeeyungi? Mujhe darr lagta hai ki agar main aise hi chalti rahi toh main bimar pad jaungi, aur tab bacchon ka kya hoga? Ab samajh nahi aa raha aage ka.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring her fear of consequences (Lens E) to confirm phase readiness.
text: Aapko chinta hai ki is dabav ke chakkar mein aapki sehat na bigad jaye aur bacchon ki dekh-bhaal par aanch na aa jaye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, main theek hona chahta hoon. Main thak gayi hoon sabko khush karne ka bojh uthate-uthate. Kya koi raasta hai jisse main apni promotion bhi sambhaal loon aur ghar mein bhi kalesh na ho?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offering small, manageable suggestions to navigate the transition.
text: Hum kuch aise raaste dekh sakte hain jo aapki image ko bhi safe rakhein. Pehla, office mein baat karke hybrid model ya flexible timings check karna taaki aap ghar jaldi aa sakein. Dusra, bacchon ko thoda thoda batana ki unki maa ka kaam kitna bada hai, taaki unka support mile.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ye ghutan career vs sanskar ki ladaai ki wajah se hai
text: Flexible timings toh office wale maan jayenge, unhe mera kaam pasand hai. Par mere parents ko ye promotion kaise samjhaun? Unke liye ye ghutan career vs sanskar ki ladaai ka koi matlab nahi hai, unhe bas meri 'izzat' se matlab hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walking through how to phrase the promotion to the parents using 'izzat' framework.
text: Pehle apne manager se flexible hours confirm kar lo. Phir parents ko promotion ke baare mein aise batao ki office ne aapke 'bacchon ke schedule' ka dhyan rakhte hue aapko chuna hai—is se unhe lagega ki bacchon ki priority abhi bhi wahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ye idea accha hai. Promotion ko 'opportunity' ke badle 'recognition of hard work plus convenience' ki tarah present karna. Kam se kam wo gussa toh nahi honge.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Systemic reframe about how single women's success is a family achievement, not a personal rebellion.
text: Humaare yahan jab ek aurat divorce ke baad kaam mein tarakki karti hai, toh parivaar ko darr lagta hai, par haqiqat ye hai ki aapki kamyabi unke liye ek thos sahara hi banegi, jo ek structural sach hai.

speaker: Seeker

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: apni khwahishon ka qatal har din karti hai
text: Haan, bilkul. It feels good. Itne saalon baad pehli baar lag raha hai ki main kuch kar rahi hoon, bhale hi mujhe abhi bhi apni khwahishon ka qatal har din karna pad raha hai gharwalon ke liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Separate Seeker's worth from the current outcome of being a homemaker.
text: Aapki value is baat se kam nahi hoti ki aap abhi ek homemaker hain; aapki himmat un 10 minute mein bhi jhalakti hai jahan aap apni identity ko zinda rakhne ki koshish kar rahi hain.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: null
text: Thank you. Main koshish karungi ki ye connection tootne na paaye. Main kal se hi wo park jaana aur laptop wala kaam shuru karungi. Kya main aapse phir baat kar sakti hoon?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the new commitment to self-connection using Lens B.
text: Aapne ab apne liye ye choti si zimmedari uthane ka faisla kar liya hai, jo bohot sarahne layak hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: apni khwahishon ka qatal har din karti hai
text: Haan. Bhale hi samaj ke darr se main abhi job nahi join kar sakti, par kam se kam mera mann toh mere sath rahega. Har din apni khwahishon ka qatal har din karna thoda kam dardnak lagega shayad.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Final reframe of self-care as survival, not selfishness.
text: In chote badlavon ko lana swarthi hona nahi hai, balki is samajik dabaav ke beech apne wajood ko bachaye rakhne ka ek zaruri rasta hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: null
text: Samajh gayi. Sukriya mere dukh ko sunne ke liye. Mujhe ab thoda confidence feel ho raha hai ki main bina kisi ko dukh diye apne liye thoda space bana sakti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Final warm closure and validation of her path.
text: Aapne is kashmakash ke beech jo raasta chuna hai wo aapki samajhdari aur parivaar ke liye pyar dono ko dikhata hai; main aapke is safar mein aapke sath hoon.
